query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_skipped,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped_24h,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped_7d
FROM calls WHERE status = 'skipped'
